net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface Seat

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier, PhysicalObject
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    SeatImpl

    public interface Seat
extends PhysicalObject
    A representation of the model object 'Seat'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Seat Blocked
    • Crew Seat
    • Letter
    • Travel Class
    • Row
    • Occupied
    • Passenger
    • Layout Concept
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getSeat()

    • Method Detail

      • isSeatBlocked

        boolean isSeatBlocked()
        Returns the value of the 'Seat Blocked' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'Seat Blocked' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Seat Blocked' attribute.
        See Also:
        setSeatBlocked(boolean), CabinPackage.getSeat_SeatBlocked()

      • setSeatBlocked

        void setSeatBlocked(boolean value)
        Sets the value of the 'Seat Blocked' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Seat Blocked' attribute.
        See Also:
        isSeatBlocked()

        Sets the value of the 'Crew Seat' attribute.
        Parameters:

      • getLayoutConcept

        LayoutConcept getLayoutConcept()
        Returns the value of the 'Layout Concept' attribute. The default value is "Default". The literals are from the enumeration LayoutConcept.

        If the meaning of the 'Layout Concept' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Layout Concept' attribute.
        See Also:
        LayoutConcept, setLayoutConcept(LayoutConcept), CabinPackage.getSeat_LayoutConcept()

      • setLayoutConcept

        void setLayoutConcept(LayoutConcept value)
        Sets the value of the 'Layout Concept' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Layout Concept' attribute.
        See Also:
        LayoutConcept, getLayoutConcept()
